app_release_notes: v0.16.20 - Polish from the new-user walk. (1) SD-only hero now shows TEST CHARGE and POWDER alongside BEST CBTO - the load's full recipe at a glance instead of three of four fields hidden. If the SD test charge isnt filled in Setup, the cell shows a yellow 'Not set - Open Setup' pill that doubles as the reminder. (2) New Clear button on the Import panel - one click wipes the Activity log AND deletes any unimported CSV files in your folders. Confirm before anything goes. (3) Walk-time audit infrastructure: signed-bundle check #28 in verify-loadscope-ui is now walk-patch-aware - distinguishes 'shipped adhoc by accident' from 'signed bundle with mid-walk pyc patch' so iteration doesnt fail the regression guard against the 2026-05-18 silent-fallback.

mac.app_release_notes: v0.16.20 - Polish from the new-user walk. SD-only hero now shows TEST CHARGE and POWDER. New Clear button on Import panel. Walk-time audit infrastructure (walk-patch-aware signed-bundle check).

windows.app_release_notes: v0.16.26 - Walk-4 batch continues. Save-Library popup CBTO line now shows the winning CBTO (was the empty Setup-time CBTO showing as a dash). Pocket Card sidebar render no longer locks at 200x200 -- defers initial rescale a tick so the inner widget has its real size + uses the scroll viewport size + the QLabel minSize prevents content-sized lock. apply_workbook_repairs now refreshes 11 stale Help-sheet cell references in EXISTING user workbooks so the in-workbook Help menu matches current cells. Plus prior 0.16.25 fixes.
